skills.name: skill-management
skills.description: Browse, install, update, and contribute skills from the ouroboros-skills shared repository. This is the bootstrap skill that teaches agents how to manage their skill library.

skills.name: work-planner
skills.description: Interactive task planner for coding tasks. Generates planning doc with human conversation, then converts to doing doc after signoff. Can resume from existing planning doc.

skills.name: work-doer
skills.description: Executes doing.md units sequentially with strict TDD. Reads the doing doc, works through each unit, commits after each. Use after planning is complete and doing.md exists.

skills.name: work-merger
skills.description: Sync-and-merge agent. Runs after work-doer completes. Fetches origin/main, merges, resolves conflicts using task docs, creates PR via gh, waits for CI, merges to main, cleans up branch.

skills.name: video-editing
skills.description: Build and edit videos using Remotion with kinetic typography, VO-synced timing, and motion design. Use this skill when the user asks to create, edit, or fix video content.
